title: aquilegia micrantha var. ecalcarata
intro: Aquilegia micrantha var. ecalcarata, also known as the small-flowered columbine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include potential treatments for various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The herbal preparations of Aquilegia micrantha var. ecalcarata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or infusions made from the plant's roots and leaves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
